name: Joseph Aoun
role: President of Lebanon (2025–present); former Lebanese Army Commander
quote: Lebanon's sovereignty must be restored. The state's authority must extend over all Lebanese territory, and the army will deploy to fulfil its constitutional mission.

name: Nawaf Salam
role: Prime Minister of Lebanon (2025–present); former ICJ President; former UN Ambassador
quote: We are here to rebuild a state based on rule of law, free from the corruption and sectarianism that brought us to this point. The reform path requires courage and we will not flinch.

name: Hassan Nasrallah
role: Hezbollah Secretary-General 1992–2024; killed Sep 27, 2024 in Israeli airstrike
quote: If [the Zionists] want all-out war, then all-out war is what they will get. We have rockets that can reach all of occupied Palestine. We are not afraid.

name: Naim Qassem
role: Hezbollah Secretary-General (2024–present); Deputy SG since 1991; theologian and party ideologist
quote: Hezbollah remains and will continue. The blood of the martyrs strengthens the resistance. We accept the ceasefire as a tactical position but our strategic mission is unchanged.

name: Nabih Berri
role: Speaker of the Lebanese Parliament since 1992; leader of Amal Movement
quote: Lebanon's parliament will work to implement the ceasefire agreement and ensure state sovereignty. The south must be returned to its people.

name: Samir Geagea
role: Lebanese Forces party leader; civil war-era militia commander; jailed 1994–2005
quote: There can be no state in Lebanon as long as a single political party maintains its own army. The time for Hezbollah's disarmament has finally come, and we will hold the government to it.

name: Rafik Hariri
role: Prime Minister 1992–1998, 2000–2004; assassinated Feb 14, 2005; rebuilt Beirut after civil war
quote: I do not despair about Lebanon. This country has an amazing capacity to recover. We will rebuild — not just the buildings, but the institutions.

name: Walid Jumblatt
role: Druze community leader; Progressive Socialist Party leader; son of assassinated Kamal Jumblatt
quote: The Druze have survived in these mountains for a thousand years by adapting. Lebanon must adapt now — disarm, reform, and stop being a proxy battlefield for everyone else's wars.

name: Michel Aoun (General)
role: President of Lebanon 2016–2022; FPM founder; former Lebanese Army Commander; exiled 1990–2005
quote: I did not aspire to the presidency for personal gain. I sought to end the era of tutelage and build a real state. History will judge whether I succeeded.

name: Gebran Bassil
role: Free Patriotic Movement (FPM) leader; son-in-law of Michel Aoun; former energy and foreign minister
quote: The FPM will not accept a settlement that bypasses the Christians' role in Lebanon. Our alliance choices may be reconsidered but our principles of sovereignty and Christian rights are not negotiable.

name: Riad Salameh
role: Governor of Banque du Liban 1993–2023; accused of embezzlement; subject of international arrest warrants
quote: I managed Lebanon's monetary policy under extraordinary circumstances for 30 years. The crisis is the result of fiscal decisions, not central bank actions.

name: Najib Miqati
role: Prime Minister 2005, 2011–2013, 2021–2025; Lebanon's wealthiest politician; caretaker before Salam
quote: Lebanon needs a president, needs a government, needs reforms. I have tried to hold the state together in the most difficult circumstances in the country's modern history.

name: Benjamin Netanyahu
role: Prime Minister of Israel; authorised 2024 Lebanon operations including Nasrallah strike
quote: Lebanon will not become Gaza. Israel will strike wherever Hezbollah hides. The era of Hezbollah terrorising Israel's north is over — it is finished.

name: Bashar al-Assad
role: President of Syria 2000–2024; key Hezbollah patron; fled Dec 2024 as Syrian government collapsed
quote: The Resistance is a strategic choice, not a tactical position. Syria and its allies will continue supporting Lebanon's resistance against Zionist aggression regardless of pressure.

name: Emmanuel Macron
role: President of France; flew to Beirut days after Aug 4, 2020 explosion; co-brokered Nov 2024 ceasefire
quote: France will never abandon Lebanon. But France cannot save Lebanon from itself. The Lebanese people deserve leaders who put their country above their sect and their personal interests.

name: Gen. Aroldo Lázaro
role: UNIFIL Force Commander (2021–present); Spanish general; oversees 10,500-troop Blue Line mission
quote: UNIFIL monitors the Blue Line and supports the implementation of UNSCR 1701. We call on all parties to respect the cessation of hostilities and cooperate with the Lebanese Armed Forces' deployment.

name: Kofi Annan (legacy)
role: UN Secretary-General; negotiated UNSCR 1701 ceasefire in 2006; established Special Tribunal for Lebanon (2005)
quote: Lebanon must be given the chance to reclaim its sovereignty. The international community has a responsibility to help Lebanon build a state free from the shadow of armed groups.

name: Ali Khamenei
role: Supreme Leader of Iran; Hezbollah's ultimate patron and ideological guide since 1989
quote: The Resistance will not be defeated. The blood of Nasrallah and the martyrs of Lebanon will produce a thousand Nasrallahs. The axis of resistance is alive and will triumph over the Zionist entity.

name: Fouad Siniora
role: Prime Minister 2005–2009; led Lebanon during 2006 war; prominent anti-Syrian political figure
quote: Lebanon wept and I wept with it during the 2006 war. We asked the world for support and we got condolences. Lebanon needs real international engagement, not just statements.

name: Amin Gemayel
role: President of Lebanon 1982–1988; Phalange party; brother of assassinated Bashir Gemayel; signed (then voided) 1983 Israel-Lebanon peace treaty
quote: I signed the May 17 Agreement believing it would bring peace. When Syria made it impossible to implement, I was left alone between two regional powers. Lebanon has always been a small country in a very large neighbourhood.
